executives.name: Walter Coles
executives.background: Mr. Coles was appointed Executive Chairman in 2023 and previously served as CEO from 2013 to 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors.

executives.name: Randy Reichert
executives.background: Mr. Reichert is a professional engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was appointed CEO in 2023 after serving as President since 2021.

executives.name: Andrew Sharp
executives.background: Mr. Sharp is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the industry. He joined Skeena in 2021 and was appointed CFO in 2022.

executives.name: Paul Geddes
executives.background: Mr. Geddes is a professional geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and development.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Exploration & Resource Development

board_of_directors.name: Walter Coles
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of the Board. Former CEO of Skeena Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Randy Reichert
board_of_directors.background: President, CEO and Director. Over 30 years of mining experience.

board_of_directors.name: Borden Putnam III
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Putnam is a geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mining and investment industries.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Kostuik
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Judith Matkaluk
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Matkaluk is a lawyer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Lori McClenahan
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McClenahan has over 30 years of experience in the junior resource sector.
